intro: Arctium lappa paste, also known as burdock root paste, is a traditional herbal remedy made from the roots of the burdock plant. The paste has been used in various cultures for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory properties and its ability to support digestive health. When consumed, arctium lappa paste is often mixed with other ingredients, such as honey or water, to create a soothing and potentially beneficial topical or internal treatment.

recipe: To make arctium lappa paste for medicinal use, clean and dry the roots of the plant, then grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder.
